title: centaurium erythraea subsp. rumelicum
intro: Centaurium erythraea subsp. rumelicum, also known as the Balkan centaury or Rumelian centaury, is a subspecies of the greater centaury plant (Centaurium erythraea), which belongs to the gentian family of flowering plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurium erythraea subsp. rumelicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Centaurium erythraea subsp. rumelicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
